item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Good job, had a bit of a laugh at this. Especially at the part about the meteorite parcel.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Short, sweet, and funny without overdoing it. Nice work.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What a great punchline! I didn't expect this article to make me laugh at all until the last sentence, which made it all the funnier. Great work!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The imagery here is great. Makes me think of a situation where firepower of this magnitude is required for self-defense.
Easy +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love how the most "reasonable" method for "compensation" was an entire kilogram worth of diamonds stuffed into a giant rock.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This dude is the multiversal twin of the leader of Three-Moons out in Corbenic; apparently, three-moons gives special anomalous protection to their leader, but this attaches in the form of DNA identification. So when The Corbenic version of this guy was given this device, so was his DNA twin on Earth.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Just as enjoyably weird as all the best corbenic articles, and short enough that it can be carried by concept and imagery alone. Pretty easy +1.

(I would note that the recovery log feels entirely superfluous though.)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I am very, very confused here. Even more confused then I typically am about Corbenic stuff. Could someone explain what the triple moons initiative did here?

item.title: Junior Staff - Site Crit
item.content:encoded:
Hey daveyoufool,

Here Be Crit / Opinion
ByeBye

Nitpicks:

In the event of a containment breach at Site-59 of other contained objects, SCP-4578 is to be quickly and voluntarily relocated to Area-4578.

This sticks out sour to me and could probably be phrased better.

Can fire up to 4,000 rounds per minute.

Fires armor-piercing projectiles.

Maybe add "It" before "can" and you could combined these both by saying "4,000 armor-piercing rounds.."

After several activations of SCP-4578-1, SCP-4578 turned himself in to law enforcement..

in to -> into

On a personal note the Islamic prayer mats are typically called sajjāda or namazlık, which I feel could be cool to use for the conprocs and put the prayer rug in a footnote.

Opinion
Little nitpicks aside I found this to be a quite enjoyable read. I really have nothing negative to say since you hit every note I'd expect from an article like this. An easy +1 from me.



Site crit : Disclaimer: Opinions expressed in this review do not reflect the opinions of SCP Wiki staff as a whole. Please respond to DrAkimoto or contact the captain of the Site Criticism Team, SoullessSingularity, for any questions or concerns relating to this review.
